Title: Billing Manager
Company Location: 1 Park Plaza, Nashville, TN 37203, United States
Company Description:
Nationally headquartered in St. Louis, Missouri, TOG is a wholly owned subsidiary of Parallon.  TOG operates with small, client-focused operations centers from coast to coast, The Outsource Group is the leading revenue cycle management serices company in the country. We focus exclusively on providing services along the revenue cycle aimed at improving a hospital's cash flow. 

The Healthcare revenue cycle has unique characteristics and needs, requiring an understanding of billing complexity, patient sensitivity, insurance processes, and knowledge of the hospital's revenue cycle, IT systems and payer requirements. Our analytical base, our use of carefully designed workflows and the right technology, as well as our specialized approach to revenue cycle management and our level of professional staffing, and our service lines reflect that understanding.

The Outsource Group has grown both organically and through the acquisition of several best-in-class companies, each providing specific healthcare-focused solutions. 

This business model enables us to provide the resources of a large company with the individualized service and flexibility of a smaller firm. Each of our centers serves a limited number of clients and is led by a client manager and operations manager who provide a high level of individualized services and greater flexibility.

Company Description:
Expeditive is the nation’s #1 provider of interim staffing and consulting for Patient Financial Services and revenue cycle management.

We created this category because we saw the need hospitals have for experienced temporary staff and consultants who can handle the challenges of revenue cycle management. We remain the industry leader because of our ability to react quickly and provide our clients with an immediate solution.

Whether your hospital requires a complete turnaround in the billing department or you simply need to fill an unexpected vacancy, Expeditive’s experts can be on premise within 48 hours. We are known for sending A/R swat teams to hospitals to drive down aging receivables.

What separates us from other healthcare staffers is that we work onsite with hospital staff and their current systems rather than providing outsourced services. This enables us to understand the source of your revenue cycle problems and address them directly. Our interim billing consultants average 13+ years of hospital A/R resolution experience and are uniquely qualified to get your revenue cycle management back on track.

Expeditive’s experts are always ready to help a Patient Financial Services department in need of a turnaround. To learn more and get in contact with us, visit our website, Expeditive.com.

Title: Chief Operating Officer
Company Location: 221 W Colorado Blvd Pavilion Ii Ste 925, Dallas, TX 75208, United States
Company Description:
MD Cloud Practice Solutions is a SaaS company, specializing in Business Optimization and Digital Transformation. Our products are designed to improve all aspects of a Revenue Cycle Management System. 
Since our founding in 2013, our priority has been the secure and HIPAA-compliant management of data. We serve as your provider interface to your practice management entity. 
The MD Cloud system and all of its products are designed to ensure maximum security. We have earned the SOC-1, SOC-2, and HIPAA certifications necessary to demonstrate our commitment to the integrity, security, and availability of your data. Additionally, our system is continuously monitored for intrusions and vulnerability by a 3rd party vendor.
MD Cloud will enable your providers to capture and transmit billing, quality, and or efficiency data to your practice management team efficiently and securely by utilizing completely electronic solutions on devices that your providers utilize every day - their smartphones, tablets, and computers. Your RCM team will then utilize our back-office tools to improve their ability to process this data. Your providers and practice management team will enjoy having the ability to accomplish all of the tasks necessary for the operation of your business in one single platform — instead of having to work with multiple IT solutions.
Our services are tailored to the unique needs of medical companies. With a proven track record in adaptability and rapid implementation, we are dedicated to making your processes more efficient while saving you money in the process.
Our comprehensive line of products includes scheduling platforms, data collection apps, and an RCM "middleware" where your RCM team will utilize our analytics and reporting tools.
MD Cloud has a growing national footprint and currently processes millions of claims per year. We understand the importance of transparency in an RCM system to meet your needs and increase your efficiency.

Company Description:
Quest Diagnostics (NYSE: DGX) empowers people to take action to improve health outcomes.  Derived from the world's largest database of clinical lab results, our diagnostic insights reveal new avenues to identify and treat disease, inspire healthy behaviors and improve health care management.  Quest annually serves one in three adult Americans and half the physicians and hospitals in the United States, and our 47,000 employees understand that, in the right hands and with the right context, our diagnostic insights can inspire actions that transform lives.
The company offers physicians the broadest test menu (3,000+ tests), is a pioneer in developing innovative new tests, is the leader in cancer diagnostics, provides anatomic pathology (AP) services, & interpretive consultation through its medical & scientific staff of about 900 M.D.s & Ph.D.s. Patients may have specimens collected in any of the company’s approximately 2,250 patient service centers. On a typical workday, testing is performed for about 550,000 patients. 
Quest Diagnostics empowers healthcare organizations & clinicians with state-of-the-art connectivity solutions. 
The company is the leading provider of pre-employment drugs-of-abuse screening for employers & risk assessment services for the life insurance industry. It is the world’s 2nd largest provider of clinical trials testing for new pharmaceuticals.
